World Sea Level Viewer

ETOPO5 global relief, including seafloors. Move sea level below zero to expose shelves, ridges, and basins that are underwater today.

Deep waterShallow water
Low exposed terrainHigh terrain
Generated by ChatGPT 5.5. Source: NOAA National Geophysical Data Center, ETOPO5 5-minute gridded global relief data. Sibling heightmap asset: world-heightmap-noaa-etopo5.png, averaged to 1080 x 540 cells and rotated to 180W..180E. Original download: ETOPO5.DOS. Values are approximate and best for visualization, not navigation or analysis.
